rationale: No-regression lens, round 2, all work in an absolute /tmp clone pinned at 2b4fb8f0, git clean. Re-swept anyway in /tmp (go1.26.1): build OK, `gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal` empty, and go test ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./internal/bead all PASS. Finding B disposition is CORRECT: FinalizeEpic/impl-approve is a pre-existing, different-verb, orchestrator-forbidden path outside 114's `complete`-scoped R1/R2; the scope note is honest (does not over-claim) and o4fd(P1) is filed — treating it as a tracked follow-up, not a 114 blocker, is the right call. No new problem introduced by the addenda. Round-1 APPROVE carried forward.
